column3: How to Find
column5: Problem

column2: All pages > Any link > Hover state
column3:
1. Enable dark mode
2. Go to any page
3. Hover over any blue hyperlink
4. Observe darker blue hover color
column5: Link hover text has dangerously low contrast - users may not see hover feedback

column3:
1. Go to any page in dark mode
2. Look at card borders
3. Look at input field borders
4. Borders are nearly invisible
column5: Borders barely visible - fails 3:1 UI component requirement

column2: API Detail > Try it out > Input fields
column3:
1. Go to API Manager detail page
2. Scroll to Try it out section
3. Look at input fields for organizationId
4. Borders are nearly invisible
column5: Input field borders invisible - users can't see field boundaries

column2: API Detail > Try it out > Input focus
column3:
1. Go to API Manager detail page
2. Click inside an input field or Tab to it
3. The blue focus outline is too subtle
column5: Focus indicator too subtle - keyboard users can't track position

column3:
1. Go to homepage in dark mode
2. Look at any API card (e.g. Access Management API)
3. Look at footer badges showing '267 endpoints' and '6 skills'
4. Gray text is difficult to read
column5: Light gray text on cards barely readable

column2: API Detail > Sidebar > Operation names (not hovered)
column3:
1. Go to API Manager detail page
2. Look at left sidebar operation list
3. Notice gray operation names before hovering
4. Text not sufficiently contrasted
column5: Operation names hard to read before selection

column3:
1. Go to API Manager detail page
2. Scroll to any operation's Try it out section
3. Look for parameter descriptions below input fields
4. Text is nearly invisible
column5: Very low contrast - users miss important parameter guidance

column3:
1. Navigate any page in dark mode
2. Look for any quaternary text labels
3. Extremely low contrast
column5: Extremely low contrast - effectively invisible to many users

column3:

2. Look at sidebar for DELETE operations

column5: DELETE method badge below AA threshold

column2: API Detail > Sidebar > Hover state text

2. Hover over any operation in sidebar
3. Text becomes unreadable on blue background
column5: Text on hover background unreadable

column3:

2. Look for horizontal section dividers

column3:

2. Look for disabled state elements
3. Very subtle visual difference
column5: Disabled elements not clearly distinguished from enabled
